name: K9 Deodorant Ultra-Cleaning Shampoo 355ml
description: K9 Fresh & Clean – Deodorant Ultra-Cleaning Shampoo solve golden hair dogs pet contaminated with urine stains, grease and other difficult to remove stains and hair to restore a smooth natural state. Benefits Antibacterial deodorant Superior ability to get rid of stains. Mild & Slight Irritating Easy Rinse Ingredients Polyquaternium – 10, Tea Saponin, Trehalose, coconut oil derivatives
